titleStmt.title: SII 10.312: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 312. (A.R. No. 563 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURTYARD OF THE TEMPLE OF JŌTINĀTHA, AT JŌTI, SIDHOUT TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT. Ś. 1169. (Plavaṅga)

summary.p: States that, during the reign of Rakkasa Gaṅgarasadēva, Chente Rāmi-Nāyaka built the compound wall and gōpura of the temple of Jōtinātha, the temple of Īrugalasāni at Takaprōlu and had two tanks dug and a temple built at Chēṭūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanu
mahāmaṁḍalēsvaraṁ trailōkyamallabhujaba
ḷavīranārāyaṇa Avuduṁbarābharaṇa kaluka
ḍapurādhīsvara Aṣṭamahāsiddhisidhavaṭa dēvara di
vyaśrīpādārādhaku laina rayidavamahārājula
nijabhrityuṁ ḍaina svasti samastalōkasaṁstutyavibhavā
marēṁdra Abhimānaśūdruka vibudhajanamitra manma
kulagōtra tyāgasamudra Ācakajanapārijāta kā
minījanajayaṁta turagarēvaṁta nujanādhāra paranā
rīdūra sāmidrōharagaṁḍa gaḍiyaṁkabhīma kō
daṁḍaparaśurāma raṇaraṁgabhairava kāruṇyasa
gara yēkāṁgavīra pāpabanadūra vairināyaka
gōtra nikṣatra vajrabhujādaṁḍa calamettugaṁḍa ri
punāyakasiraḥkhaṁḍana dāyasaṁhara
maṁḍaḷikajagadāḷa rāyabhūpāludakṣiṇa
bhujādaṁḍa sitaranaṁkukaragaṁḍa jōtināthu
ni divyaśrīpādārādhaku ḍaina ceṁte rāmināya
kuṁḍu ta nnēlina rakkasagaṁgarasadēvamahārājulu
prithivi rājyaṁ sēyucuṁna nāṭisakavaruṣamu
lu 1169 Agu plavaṁgasaṁvatsaramuna jē
ṣṭasudha trayōdasi vaḍavāramunāḍu jō
tināthuni kōṭagōpuramu gaṭiṁce takaprō
la nīrugalasāni guḍigaṭiṁce bēṭūra reṁ
ḍuceṟuvulu traviṁce guḍigaṭiṁce Agrahāramu
viḍice maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.312 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
